title: boechera shockleyi
intro: Boechera shockleyi, also known as Shockley's rockcress, is a rare and endangered species of flowering plant in the mustard family (Brassicaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial compounds. The health benefits of Boechera shockleyi include reducing inflammation and fighting off infections, as well as supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Boechera shockleyi can be made by infusing the plant's leaves and flowers in hot water to create a tea, or by using the plant's roots to create a tincture.
